## ⚡ Quick Summary Cyber Security Services (CSS) is an independent cybersecurity consulting firm providing penetration testing, virtual CISO, compliance readiness, and incident response services to U.S. organizations. --- ## Extracted Information | Field | Value | |-------|-------| | **Company Name** | Cyber Security Services (CSS) | | **One-Sentence Description** | Independent cybersecurity consulting firm that helps organizations identify security gaps, improve compliance readiness, and protect critical systems with practical cybersecurity solutions. | | **What They Do** (short list) | • Penetration Testing
• Virtual CISO (vCISO) Services
• Incident Response
• Security Operations Center (SOC)
• Risk Assessment & Compliance (SOC 2, PCI DSS, ISO 27001, HIPAA, CMMC)
• Cybersecurity Consulting
• AI Security | | **Headquarters Location** | Westerville, Ohio (Columbus metro), United States | | **Year Founded** | 2014 | | **Size of Company** | Not provided in the gathered data | | **Key People / Titles** | Not provided in the gathered data | | **Target Client Industries** | U.S. organizations; mentions securing Fortune 100 companies since 2014 (no specific verticals listed) | | **Technologies / Tools** | Not explicitly listed (services are methodology/consulting-based); noted as an original contributor to the NIST Cybersecurity Framework | | **Notable Clients / Case Studies** | Fortune 100 companies (no specific names or case studies in provided data) | | **Main Competitors** | Not mentioned in the gathered data | | **Awards / Recognition** | Recognized as an original contributor to the NIST Cybersecurity Framework — named alongside Microsoft, IBM, DHS, and DoD. |
